record.field: Análisis de riego: ${object.partner_id.name}, ${object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[:4]} - ${object.controlperiod_id.end_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[:4]}

div.p:
Estimado Sr./Sra. ${object.partner_id.name},
Adjuntamos su informe de análisis de riego correspondiente al siguiente período: ${object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[:4]} - ${object.controlperiod_id.end_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[:4]}.
Reciba un cordial saludo.

record.field: Estimación de riego: ${object.partner_id.name}, ${object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[:4]} - ${object.controlperiod_id.end_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[:4]}

div.p:
Estimado Sr./Sra. ${object.partner_id.name},
Adjuntamos su informe de estimación de riego correspondiente al siguiente período: ${object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.initial_date[:4]} - ${object.controlperiod_id.end_date[8:10] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[5:7] + '/' + object.controlperiod_id.end_date[:4]}.
Reciba un cordial saludo.
